threads: migrating EKS workloads to GKE for cost optimization
refactoring auth middleware to use OIDC instead of static JWTs
investigating intermittent 504 errors on customer dashboard
implementing rate limiting on the public API gateway
rotating production database credentials and updating Vault paths
building Terraform module for new VPC peering setup
onboarding new SRE engineer with runbook updates
preparing SOC 2 Type II audit evidence collection

messages.content: Standup time — today's plan covers the GKE migration, OIDC cutover, the dashboard 504, rate limiter rollout, DB rotation, VPC peering review, SRE onboarding, and SOC 2 evidence. Walk me through each.
Pulling cost numbers — EKS prod is at $28,400/month. What does GKE quote for equivalent capacity?
GKE quote for similar capacity on a standard-32-spot-pool node pool is roughly $11,200/month — about 60% reduction. The cluster id will be gke-prod-molt-us-central1-a.
Status on OIDC migration?
OIDC issuer is up at https://auth.moltai.com/realms/prod. Currently cutting over the auth middleware to validate against that instead of the static JWT signing key.
504 errors on the dashboard — any update?
Sentry issue PROJ-12847 shows error rate at about 0.7%, just above our 0.5% threshold. Affecting /api/v2/dashboard/metrics specifically.
Rate limiter status?
Redis backend up at redis://rl-prod.cache.amazonaws.com:6379/3. Default policy is 1000 req/min per token. API gateway id agi-9k3jx7q2vp will route through it.
DB credential rotation — where are we?
New password written to kv/prod/db/master/v3. Old creds at kv/prod/db/master/v2 still active for 24h grace period. Vault namespace admin/molt-prod.
VPC peering Terraform module — ready for review?
Module is up. Peering connection id is pcx-0a8c4e7f23b9d1e5a. PR is #1247 in the infra repo.
New SRE start date?
Maya Lin starts Monday. Email maya.lin@moltaicorp.com. Day one onboarding is the runbook walkthrough.
SOC 2 audit window?
Type II window is 2026-04-01 to 2026-06-30. Auditor PM is audit-pm@trustwave.com. Evidence going into s3://moltai-soc2-evidence/2026-q2/.
Confirm: gke-prod-molt-us-central1-a is in us-central1-a zone, right?
Correct. Single-zone for now to minimize cross-zone egress costs while we validate. The EKS cluster we are migrating from is arn:aws:eks:us-east-1:492372116065:cluster/molt-prod.
New JWT key id?
kid-2026-05-prod-001 — this is the OIDC-signed key id we are validating against. Auth session TTL set to 8h to match the old static config.
Is it the same endpoint every time?
Always /api/v2/dashboard/metrics. Looks like an upstream timeout to the analytics service. Holding off on the GKE migration of dashboard until this is resolved.
Per-tier overrides?
Free tier 100/min, paid 1000/min, enterprise 10000/min. All keyed by token claims. Default 1000 req/min applies if claim is absent.
Master endpoint?
molt-prod.cluster-cqm9w.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com:5432 — same endpoint, just creds rotating.
Test plan?
Apply to sandbox first, then prod. Sandbox already shows successful peering across the two VPCs.
Runbook URL?
https://wiki.moltaicorp.com/sre/runbooks/incident-response-v4 — newly updated to reflect the OIDC migration and the rate limiter rollout.
Bucket access controls verified?
Yes — only the audit IAM role can read. Bucket has SSE-KMS, versioning, MFA delete enabled.
What workloads go first?
Stateless API workers first. Customer dashboard last because of the 504 issue we are still debugging. Target monthly spend: $11,200 vs current $28,400.
Are we keeping backwards compat for old tokens?
Yes, dual-path validation for 30 days. After that we drop the static path and only honor OIDC tokens with kid kid-2026-05-prod-001.
Roll back the recent dashboard deploy?
Already tried. Issue persisted on previous build too. Not a new regression — looks pre-existing but only now exceeding the 0.5% threshold.
Deploy timeline?
Soft launch tomorrow (read-only headers, no enforcement). Hard cutover end of week assuming 504 fixed.
When does v2 path get deleted?
24h after all services confirm successful auth via v3. We will revoke v2 manually after the metrics dashboard signals all good.
Approval needed?
Need network lead sign-off before prod apply. PR #1247 is the canonical review request.
Anyone shadowing her?
Yes, pairing with senior on-call for the first two weeks. Hand-off after that.
Outstanding items?
Just the credential rotation evidence (covered by the v3 vault path) and the OIDC cutover docs. Both should land this week.
Anything else on refactoring auth middleware to use OIDC instead of static JWTs?
No new updates on that thread since the last message. Status: in progress per earlier notes.
